title: SCORCHED EARTH ZZT
technique: Irregular gray and white block letters use stepped edges and internal stipple; the compact ZZT tag is red.
composition: Two-line upper-left wordmark dominates an otherwise empty black field; tiny credits balance the lower corners.
quality: Excellent contrast hierarchy: rough large lettering carries the title while the red tag gives a single sharp accent.
summary: Rough gray block lettering on black, with a compact red ZZT accent and tiny corner credits.
